narrative:
Liberty Twp. township has 1,149 registered voters, with 48.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 44.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 37.4 percentage points.
